subject: Fermi GBM trigger 100612038 is not a GRB
body:
P. N. Bhat (UAH), reports on behalf of
the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

�The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 100612038 at 00:55:05.65 UT
on 12 June 2010, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is due to M 2.0 class Solar Flare."
